title: pilosella macranthela
intro: Pilosella macranthela, also known as the Greater Hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, with its roots containing sesquiterpene lactones, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pilosella macranthela include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Pilosella macranthela may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
